channel.title: Home on Our Little Helpers
channel.description: Recent content in Home on Our Little Helpers

item.title: A Good Monitor Arm
item.description: Along with the monitor, I got the ERGOTRON HX monitor arm. Perfect for quickly adjusting the monitor up or down, tilting it, or even pivoting it to one side when you want to watch a call or movie from the couch.

item.title: A Large, High-Resolution Monitor
item.description:
For a long time, I was a strong advocate of dual or even triple monitor setups. For the past few years, though, I’ve been using just a single 40" 4K monitor (3840 × 2160) — and I wouldn’t go back. The combination of size and resolution effectively replaces multiple screens:

  • It works like having four Full HD monitors. The advantage of 4K here isn’t so much pixel density (ppi), but the sheer amount of usable screen space.
  • Long documents are easy to handle. The left, right, and even center sections can display more content than a vertically oriented Full HD screen. For example, you can comfortably run three windows side by side at 1280 × 2160 each.
  • Large spreadsheets stay readable. A 40" 4K display can show well over 40 columns and 200 rows at a comfortable size.

My current monitor is no longer available and technically outdated, but the Philips monitor has been a reliable daily driver since 2017.

item.title: Legal Notice
item.description:
Provider Information

Jonathan Vogt
Griesmayerstr. 6
89233 Neu-Ulm

Contact

Email: nospam.info@cleverlittlethings.de

Responsible for Editorial Content

Jonathan Vogt
Griesmayerstr. 6
89233 Neu-Ulm

Dispute Resolution

The European Commission provides a platform for online dispute resolution (ODR):
https://ec.europa.eu/consumers/odr/

We are neither obligated nor willing to participate in dispute settlement proceedings before a consumer arbitration board.

Liability for Content

As a service provider, we are responsible for our own content on these pages under general law. However, we are not obligated to monitor transmitted or stored third-party information or investigate circumstances indicating illegal activity.

item.title: Privacy Policy
item.description:
1. Data Controller

Jonathan Vogt
Griesmayerstr. 6
89233 Neu-Ulm

Email: nospam.info@cleverlittlethings.de

2. Hosting and Server Logs

When you access this website, technical access data may be processed by the hosting provider (for example IP address, timestamp, requested URL, referrer, and browser information). This processing is required to provide and secure the website.

3. Affiliate Links and Tracking Parameters

This website uses affiliate links. If you click such a link, the respective partner may detect that the click originated from this website (for example through URL parameters such as UTM parameters or partner IDs). This allows commissions to be attributed.

item.title: Wellness at Home
item.description:
This collection highlights small home helpers that create a calmer environment.

Expect practical picks for evening wind-down, gentle organization, and everyday comfort. The goal is not perfection; it is reducing noise and friction so daily life feels lighter.

We prioritize products that are easy to integrate, low maintenance, and supportive of realistic routines.
